subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He sendeth down from the heaven of grace whatsoever He willeth and desireth. Verily, He is the One Who sendeth down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو ینزل من سماء الفضل ما شاء و اراد انه لهو المنزل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
